sections.paragraph: ἀναίρεσις, εως, ἡ [ἀναιρέω; an activity that involves taking something away, hence, ‘eliminate, destroy’] ‘taking away of life’, killing Ac 8:1; 13:28 v.l.; 22:20 v.l. (in all these passages ‘murder’ would be too strong a rendering, for Saul [Paul] and Pilate were involved in forensic processes of some type).
